title: Mythical Mobs
description: A collection of mythical mobs for Fabic
body:
Mythical Mobs is a new project with a vision of bringing a host of mythical creatures into the Fabric ecosystem. The mod is currently in development, and will be updated with new features and bug fixes as time goes on.  We are open for feedback on additional mobs and features so leave a comment below to voice your opinions.  For more information and updates join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/KJPBZuDmBT).  If you are a modder interested in assisting with the development of this mod, please reach out to Charm8er here or on Discord. 

 

Currently Included:  
-Unicorns  

Next Up:  
-Fire Dragon  
-Forest Pixie  

Planned Additions:  
-Dragons  
-Mermaids  
-Pixies  
-Goblins  
-Gryphon  
-Cyclops  
-Hippogriffs  
-Pegasus  
-Basilisks  
-Centaurs  
-Stags    
   
Current and planned features may change at any time.
